concepts.name: Maximum Permissible Exposure
concepts.description: Maximum laser exposure level considered safe for human tissue

concepts.name: Nominal Ocular Hazard Distance
concepts.description: Distance at which laser irradiance falls below Maximum Permissible Exposure for the eye

concepts.name: Nominal Hazard Zone
concepts.description: Physical space where laser radiation exceeds the MPE

concepts.name: Accessible Emission Limit
concepts.description: Maximum laser power accessible during operation for a given class

concepts.name: Wavelength
concepts.description: Physical property determining laser light color and tissue interaction

concepts.name: Beam Divergence
concepts.description: Angular spread of the laser beam as it propagates

concepts.name: Beam Irradiance
concepts.description: Laser power per unit area incident on a surface

concepts.name: Laser Power
concepts.description: Rate of energy delivery by the laser beam

concepts.name: Laser Safety Officer
concepts.description: Person with executive responsibility and authority for laser safety program

concepts.name: Laser Classification
concepts.description: System categorizing lasers by hazard level based on accessible emission

concepts.name: Class I Laser
concepts.description: Laser product that is safe under all conditions of normal use

concepts.name: Class II Laser
concepts.description: Low-power visible laser where blink reflex provides protection

concepts.name: Retinal Hazard Region
concepts.description: Wavelength range where laser light can focus on the retina

concepts.name: Ultraviolet Radiation
concepts.description: Wavelength range below 400 nm absorbed primarily by the cornea

concepts.name: Pulse Energy
concepts.description: Total energy delivered in a single laser pulse

concepts.name: Protective Eyewear
concepts.description: Personal protective equipment with specified optical density for laser wavelengths

concepts.name: Safety Interlock
concepts.description: Fail-safe system that prevents laser operation when access is gained

concepts.name: Warning Labels
concepts.description: Required signage indicating laser class and hazard level

concepts.name: Blink Reflex
concepts.description: Involuntary eye closure that provides protection for visible lasers

concepts.name: Photochemical Damage
concepts.description: Light-induced chemical damage to tissue, especially significant for short wavelengths

concepts.name: Thermal Damage
concepts.description: Heat-induced tissue damage from absorbed laser energy

concepts.name: Cornea
concepts.description: Outer transparent layer of the eye that absorbs UV and far-IR radiation

concepts.name: Retina
concepts.description: Light-sensitive tissue at the back of the eye where visible and NIR lasers focus

concepts.name: Pulse Repetition Frequency
concepts.description: Number of laser pulses emitted per second

concepts.name: Optical Density
concepts.description: Logarithmic measure of laser protective eyewear attenuation

concepts.name: Engineering Controls
concepts.description: Physical measures built into laser systems to reduce hazards

concepts.name: Administrative Controls
concepts.description: Policies and procedures to reduce laser hazards

concepts.name: Personal Protective Equipment
concepts.description: Individual protective equipment used when other controls are insufficient

concepts.name: ANSI Z136.1
concepts.description: American National Standard for Safe Use of Lasers

concepts.name: ANSI Z136.10
concepts.description: American National Standard for Safe Use of Lasers in Entertainment

concepts.name: FDA Variance
concepts.description: Permission from FDA to deviate from laser performance standards

concepts.name: Audience Scanning
concepts.description: Intentional projection of laser beams into audience areas

concepts.name: 21 CFR 1040
concepts.description: Federal regulation for laser product performance standards

concepts.name: Scan Failure Detection
concepts.description: System to automatically terminate emission upon scanner malfunction

concepts.name: IEC 60825-1
concepts.description: International standard for laser product safety

concepts.name: FAA Outdoor Laser Operations
concepts.description: Federal Aviation Administration regulations for outdoor laser operations

concepts.name: Laser Free Zone
concepts.description: Airspace near runways where laser illumination is prohibited

concepts.name: Flashblindness
concepts.description: Temporary vision impairment from bright light exposure

concepts.name: NOTAM
concepts.description: Notice to pilots regarding laser operations in an area

concepts.name: 18 USC 39A
concepts.description: Federal law prohibiting aiming lasers at aircraft

concepts.name: AS/NZS 4173
concepts.description: Australian/New Zealand Standard for laser safety

concepts.name: ILDA Country Category
concepts.description: International Laser Display Association classification system for global regulatory complexity

concepts.name: Laser Operator License
concepts.description: Required license for laser operation in New Zealand

concepts.name: International Show Documentation
concepts.description: Comprehensive documentation required for international laser show deployment

concepts.name: ATA Carnet
concepts.description: Temporary import/export document for equipment

concepts.name: State Laser Regulations
concepts.description: State-specific laser safety and registration requirements

concepts.name: 12 NYCRR Part 50
concepts.description: New York State regulation for laser radiation protection

concepts.name: Texas Laser Registration
concepts.description: Texas regulations for laser registration and radiation safety

concepts.name: Class IIIa Laser
concepts.description: Low-risk laser with power up to 5 mW in visible range

concepts.name: Class IIIb Laser
concepts.description: Medium-power laser presenting ocular and skin hazards

concepts.name: Class IV Laser
concepts.description: High-power laser with diffuse reflection and fire hazards

concepts.name: Key Control
concepts.description: Removable key to prevent unauthorized laser operation

concepts.name: Remote Interlock
concepts.description: Connection point for external safety interlock devices

concepts.name: Beam Attenuator
concepts.description: Device to prevent laser emission without turning power off

concepts.name: Protective Housing
concepts.description: Physical enclosure preventing access to laser radiation

concepts.name: Photochemical Skin Damage
concepts.description: Ultraviolet-induced skin damage including sunburn and erythema

concepts.name: Thermal Skin Damage
concepts.description: Heat-induced skin damage from laser absorption

concepts.name: Fitzpatrick Scale
concepts.description: Classification system for skin pigmentation and UV sensitivity

concepts.name: Scotoma
concepts.description: Area of partial or complete vision loss from retinal damage

concepts.name: Class 3R Laser
concepts.description: IEC classification replacing Class 3A with slightly higher limits

concepts.name: Class 1M Laser
concepts.description: Safe under normal viewing but hazardous with magnifying optics

concepts.name: Extended Sources
concepts.description: Laser sources with significant angular size affecting hazard evaluation

concepts.name: Laser Product Report
concepts.description: Required report to FDA prior to introducing laser product to commerce

concepts.name: Annual Report
concepts.description: Annual report of laser product manufacturing to FDA

concepts.name: Emergency Stop
concepts.description: Manual control for immediate laser shutdown in emergencies

concepts.name: Laser Safety Adviser
concepts.description: Person who advises on laser safety without executive authority

concepts.name: Standard Operating Procedure
concepts.description: Documented procedure for safe laser operation

concepts.name: Hazard Evaluation
concepts.description: Systematic assessment of laser hazards in a facility or application

concepts.name: Control Measures
concepts.description: Measures implemented to reduce or eliminate laser hazards

concepts.name: Training Requirements
concepts.description: Required training for laser personnel based on hazard level

concepts.name: Authorized Personnel
concepts.description: Individuals approved to work with or near lasers

concepts.name: Medical Surveillance
concepts.description: Medical monitoring of laser workers including baseline eye exams

concepts.name: Incident Reporting
concepts.description: Procedures for reporting and investigating laser incidents

concepts.name: Laser Notice 56
concepts.description: FDA guidance on conformance with IEC 60825-1 Edition 3

concepts.name: Laser Notice 50
concepts.description: FDA guidance for safe laser light shows

concepts.name: Product Recall
concepts.description: Process for recalling defective laser products

concepts.name: Medical Laser Product
concepts.description: Laser product designed for medical applications with special requirements

concepts.name: Demonstration Laser
concepts.description: Laser product used for demonstrations and displays

concepts.name: Green Laser
concepts.description: 532nm wavelength laser most commonly involved in aviation incidents

concepts.name: Critical Flight Zone
concepts.description: 10 NM radius from airport requiring special consideration

concepts.name: FAA Form 7140-1
concepts.description: Notice of Proposed Outdoor Laser Operation form

concepts.name: TC 76
concepts.description: IEC Technical Committee 76 responsible for laser safety standards

concepts.name: EN 60825-1
concepts.description: European adoption of IEC 60825-1 laser standard

concepts.name: Global Harmonization
concepts.description: Alignment of national standards with international IEC standards

concepts.name: Radiation Safety Act
concepts.description: New Zealand legislation governing radiation safety including lasers

concepts.name: Category A Country
concepts.description: ILDA category for countries with minimal laser regulation

concepts.name: Category B Country
concepts.description: ILDA category for countries requiring advance notification

concepts.name: Category F Country
concepts.description: ILDA category for countries with comprehensive regulation

concepts.name: Category G Country
concepts.description: ILDA category for government-controlled laser regulation

concepts.name: Category X Country
concepts.description: ILDA category for countries with significant restrictions

concepts.name: Permit Lead Time
concepts.description: Time required to obtain permits for international laser shows

concepts.name: Work Permit
concepts.description: Legal authorization for international crew to work

concepts.name: Document Translation
concepts.description: Requirement to translate documents to local language

concepts.name: Advance Notification
concepts.description: Requirement to notify authorities before laser installation

concepts.name: Routine Inspections
concepts.description: Periodic inspections by state regulatory agencies

concepts.name: Laser Operator Training
concepts.description: State-mandated training for laser operators

concepts.name: EM 60825 Series
concepts.description: Series of IEC standards for laser product safety

concepts.name: ISO 11553
concepts.description: ISO standard for laser processing machine safety

concepts.name: ICNIRP Guidelines
concepts.description: International Commission on Non-Ionizing Radiation Protection guidelines

concepts.name: Event Safety Planning
concepts.description: Comprehensive planning for event safety including laser shows
